untranslatable_reason: Signal requires z-score calculation with unspecified lookback period, lagged entry by one period, and triple rollover interest rate adjustments on specific weekdays (Wednesday for AUD, Thursday for CAD). Z-score is not in the allowed indicator list. The position sizing adjustment based on rollover interest rates and day-of-week logic cannot be expressed using allowed operators and indicators. The exact moving average period is marked AUTHOR_SILENT.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses simple mean reversion (price vs SMA) as proxy for z-score deviation, but this does not capture: (1) the statistical z-score calculation, (2) lagged entry trigger, (3) triple rollover multiplier on specific weekdays, or (4) the exact lookback period for moving average. A complete implementation requires custom indicator support for z-score and conditional position sizing logic based on calendar dates.
